summary: Forensic evidence dossier documenting Wincham Group's systematic marketing claims about avoiding Spanish ITP (Impuesto de Transmisiones Patrimoniales / Property Transfer Tax) across their multiple websites from 2007–2026. Includes verbatim quotes with source URLs and Wayback Machine archive timestamps, screenshot evidence, the mathematical basis for the 16.5% figure, and legal analysis under Hedley Byrne negligent misstatement doctrine. Covers wincham.com, winchamiht.com, winchamukcompany.com, and winchampropertyshop.com.
